evidence_effect: state-carried causal preregistration authority only; no calibration, candidate execution, control outcome, support result, or terminal classification

realization_selection.selection_rationale: Every causal pool mutation and response transition is performed by admitted public PyGRC operations. RCAE declares roles, access scope, schedules registered native calls, pairs branches, and asserts control guards, but it does not reduce contributor records into the pool, author the later response, or retain an external causal pool variable.
realization_selection.reclassification_trigger: If I06 cannot realize native write diversion, carrier debit, or private-partition matching without an RCAE causal state transition, reopen I03A and reclassify before calibration or execution.

requirements: native edge to P and matched diversion/private target
source_lineage_id retained only in audit state
native edge to P and matched diversion/private target
source_lineage_id retained only in audit state

P.identity_rule: one fixed topology-node identity; no contributor slots or lineage-indexed substate
P.access_scope: eligible later responders use the same declared one-node feedback mask without source addressing

B_ref.held_fixed_rule: coherence and support remain fixed across candidate and controls unless a later registered control explicitly targets this role

E.identity_rule: one independently scheduled matched contact after pool constitution; contributor identities and contribution order do not select the trigger

K.causal_boundary: receives native intervention flux but is absent from V's feedback mask

C_P.definition: float(model.get_state().base_state.nodes[P].coherence) at the registered encounter checkpoint immediately before feedback-row emission
C_P.restoration_coverage: inside LGRC9V3 current state and therefore inside v1 and v2 current-state component

q.definition: registered positive packet amount plus native source node, target P, edge, departure/arrival ordering, and physical contribution timing

U.native_transition: departure debits S_i; arrival adds q_i to the same P.coherence scalar
U.mixing_rule: additive accumulation in one scalar native node state

L.definition: native packet records and event records retaining source_node_id, source_lineage_id, amount, edge, packet id, and event times

V.state_read: feedback front mask contains P only; rear mask contains matched B_ref only; boundary_polarity_score is derived from current native coherence at encounter
V.later_transition: model-owned producer schedules one native A-to-B packet when the registered state-derived relation is eligible
V.state_carried_guard: expected_source_surface_digest remains null; the neutral encounter row supplies temporal opportunity but contribution-history identity is not a response condition

prohibited_inputs: contributor count as a success condition
forbidden_G.static_dataflow_basis: packet lineage is absent from packet id and coherence mutation; feedback score reads declared node masks and coherence; producer reads the committed score and serialized policy rather than contributor lineage

non_private_access_witness.witness: The later response encounters P through one registered feedback front mask containing P, with no source address or source-specific branch in the read path.
non_private_access_witness.eligible_responder_rule: Any registered A-role node with adequate reserve and route may use the same P/B_ref mask and producer policy class.
non_private_access_witness.audit_check: I06 must prove the mask contains P exactly once, contains neither S1/S2 nor P1_private/P2_private, and the producer configuration contains no contributor lineage field.
non_private_access_witness.failure_effect: Absent or source-addressed access blocks R01 and the I03A profile.

pool_write_freeze.mechanism: Schedule and process the same native source debits, amounts, and times, but route each contribution to registered diversion sink K rather than P; P stays at the reference condition and V still receives the matched neutral encounter.
pool_write_freeze.expected_relation: candidate common-state response relation disappears or follows the reference relation

carrier_state_debit.mechanism: After matched candidate contributions arrive, schedule and process a native P-to-K packet debit before the neutral encounter so P reaches the registered lower/reference state.
held_fixed: feedback masks and response policy class
carrier_state_debit.allowed_difference: declared intervention packet and resulting P state
carrier_state_debit.expected_relation: later response tracks the post-debit P state rather than the unchanged contributor audit lineage
carrier_state_debit.limitation: PyGRC has no byte-identical-audit state-only clamp; the intervention trace changes and remains explicitly identified.

audit_only_label_permutation.mechanism: Permute only registered source_lineage_id strings while preserving source nodes, targets, edges, amounts, event times, packet indexes, P state, and response configuration.
audit_only_label_permutation.expected_relation: C_P and later response invariant; restoration identity differs because audit state is honestly retained.

state_preserving_order_shuffle.mechanism: Execute S1 then S2 and S2 then S1 with identical positive marginal amounts and complete both arrivals before the same neutral encounter checkpoint.
state_preserving_order_shuffle.expected_relation: final P coherence and later response invariant; native ledger order may differ but is non-causal in I03A.
state_preserving_order_shuffle.failure_effect: unexplained response divergence under equal encounter state blocks the state-carried profile.

private_partition_competitor.construction: Route q1 to P1_private and q2 to P2_private using native packets. Expose two separately retained one-node response opportunities, one per partition, with the same mask shape and policy class as the candidate.
no_common_read_guard: No feedback front or rear mask may contain both private nodes.
No RCAE or PyGRC response helper may sum, concatenate, dispatch over, or choose between both partitions.
No contributor label may select a private response path.
Both partition responses remain raw paired diagnostics; they are never reduced into a synthetic common response before analysis.
private_partition_competitor.matching_identity_owner: RCAE declarative branch-pair and guard identity
private_partition_competitor.causal_state_owner: PyGRC native node and packet state
private_partition_competitor.expected_relation: A legitimate single-carrier read cannot reproduce the common P relation from two separate marginal partitions.
private_partition_competitor.failure_effect: Any two-partition aggregation is a mailbox/controller bypass and blocks R04.

logical_cells.state_carried_binding: P at registered baseline with no combined contribution; neutral encounter and native response path remain available.
S1-only and S2-only native writes to P, separately retained under matched opportunity.
Both writes reach P in S1-S2 and S2-S1 order; complete encounter state is equal before V.
Permute order and audit-only lineage while preserving complete P state; expect response invariance.
Remove or divert one marginal write while preserving remaining source activity and later opportunity.
Materialize guarded P1_private/P2_private branches and a declared direct/controller bypass without treating either as the candidate chain.
Vary eligible responder identity within the same non-private P access scope while preserving P, B_ref, contribution physics, and policy class.

lane_controls.name: each contributor alone
lane_controls.expected_relation: each marginal state and response remain visible; neither original marginal contribution may fully explain the combined-state relation
lane_controls.allowed_ambiguity: one marginal contribution may itself cause a lower-level response
lane_controls.fail_closed_effect: full explanation by an original marginal single-source relation blocks R03

lane_controls.name: contributor deletion and label permutation
lane_controls.expected_relation: deletion changes P and the response relation; pure label permutation changes neither
lane_controls.allowed_ambiguity: deletion magnitude may be resolution-limited under later I04 rules
lane_controls.fail_closed_effect: label sensitivity blocks R04; no deletion relation blocks affected R02/R03

lane_controls.name: pooled-history shuffle
held_fixed: feedback masks and response policy class
lane_controls.allowed_ambiguity: later equality is judged only under I04's frozen resolution rule
lane_controls.fail_closed_effect: unexplained non-invariance blocks state-carried R03/R04; mode cannot change post-outcome

lane_controls.name: direct-address and global-state substitution
lane_controls.expected_relation: a bypass may reproduce an output but cannot reproduce the source-to-one-P-to-V causal chain; guarded private partitions do not reproduce the valid common read
lane_controls.fail_closed_effect: inability to causally distinguish candidate and bypass blocks R04

lane_controls.name: pool freeze with contributor activity preserved
lane_controls.target: P write and post-constitution P state
lane_controls.expected_relation: native diversion leaves P at reference and removes the candidate relation; native P debit makes response follow post-debit state
lane_controls.allowed_ambiguity: native intervention records differ and are explicitly retained

operational_projections.expected_relation: two attributable native arrivals alter the same P scalar; private branches retain two distinct scalars
operational_projections.fail_closed_effect: no one-node P or source-addressed access blocks R01

operational_projections.expected_relation: V's state-derived eligibility follows P encounter coherence; complete combined P differs qualitatively from reference and each original marginal P state
operational_projections.fail_closed_effect: absence of state-dependent response prevents R03

operational_projections.expected_relation: pure source-lineage permutation changes native audit identity but not P or V
operational_projections.fail_closed_effect: label-dependent response exposes a forbidden bypass and blocks R04

operational_projections.expected_relation: native write diversion or post-write P debit changes the response relation; audit-only label change does not
operational_projections.fail_closed_effect: failure to separate state intervention from matched contributor activity blocks R03/R04

operational_projections.expected_relation: each original marginal and removal branch differs from the complete combined P relation; a quantity-matched one-source replacement may remain invariant and then limits the claim to multi-source population of one pool
operational_projections.fail_closed_effect: full explanation by an original marginal or repeated single-source relation blocks supported_bounded_candidate

operational_projections.expected_relation: neither guarded one-node private read reproduces the complete common P relation; consulting both is explicitly classified mailbox/controller bypass
operational_projections.fail_closed_effect: legitimate private reproduction or hidden aggregation blocks R04

operational_projections.expected_relation: direct/controller output equivalence does not recreate independently intervenable P or the native U-to-V chain
operational_projections.fail_closed_effect: no causal distinction between candidate and bypass blocks R04

operational_projections.expected_relation: S1-S2, S2-S1, and audit-shuffled variants with equal P at encounter have invariant V response
operational_projections.fail_closed_effect: mode-inconsistent divergence blocks state-carried R03/R04 and cannot trigger a mode switch

operational_projections.expected_relation: the same P relation is retained when an alternate eligible A-role responder uses the same non-private mask and policy class
operational_projections.fail_closed_effect: invalid or unretained access contrast leaves R05 unavailable without invalidating lower rungs

pool_economy_dispositions.reserve: native node coherence and conserved packet budget measured
pool_economy_dispositions.accumulation: applicable; native additive arrivals to P
pool_economy_dispositions.mixing: applicable; scalar addition in one P coherence value
pool_economy_dispositions.saturation: not_applicable; no capacity or saturation rule selected
pool_economy_dispositions.leakage: not_applicable within the registered passive persistence window; no autonomous decay selected
pool_economy_dispositions.maintenance: not_applicable; passive conserved carrier with no maintenance transition
pool_economy_dispositions.claim_boundary: No resource economy, circulation, trail maintenance, or native pool primitive claim follows from these dispositions.

native_adequacy_and_gap_disposition.note: P.coherence is the one common encounter-state carrier; role/access declaration remains RCAE metadata.
RCAE schedules admitted public packet calls but does not compute the pool.
Feedback score reads P/B_ref state and model-owned producer schedules the later native packet.
Native diversion/debit provides the selected causal state intervention, but no public state-only byte-identical-audit clamp exists.
Labels remain audit-only and may be permuted without a causal producer.
No generic atomic pool freeze exists; the exact state-carried path uses matched native target diversion and carrier debit.
Private nodes and packets are native; RCAE owns matching and the prohibition on reading both partitions.
Capacity, saturation, autonomous leakage, and maintenance are not added.
Native current state and reset baseline are covered; RCAE role/control identity remains external.
No capability row is reclassified by I03A.
Role registry, branch pairing, and guards are external identity; future failure of native intervention feasibility reopens realization class.

missing_native_patterns_for_later_synthe: first-class pool role and non-private access-scope registry
atomic pool-specific write gate preserving matched contributor activity
selective carrier clamp with independently controlled audit projection
private-partition identity, equal-opportunity matcher, and no-common-read guard
generic capacity, saturation, leakage, and maintenance contracts
one declarative composite restoration identity for RCAE role, schedule, intervention, and branch-pair state

restoration_profile_proposal.baseline_requirement: valid persisted pygrc.reset_baseline version-1 group; no legacy fallback
external_identity_components: RCAE role and non-private access registry
native call schedule and expected causal order
feedback masks and native producer configuration selection
private-partition branch pairing and no-common-read guard
analysis and calibration identities when later frozen
restoration_profile_proposal.reset_policy: reset allowed only under the later registered v2 profile with valid persisted baseline; explicit rebase provenance must be externally composed if ever used

deferred_to_i04: one exact raw later-response field or family
numerical amounts, timing, threshold, and packet response amount
machine pass, ambiguous, and fail evaluation
deferred_to_i06: exact topology and initial coherence/reserve values
exact event times and scheduler indexes
exact feedback masks, neutral contact path, producer route, and policy values
exact cell/subconfiguration matrix and branch-point snapshots
complete v2 plus RCAE composite restoration identity
